title: Junior SEO Specialist at Juicy Chemistry

jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Juicy Chemistry
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Juicy Chemistry! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Madurai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Juicy Chemistry:
Juicy Chemistry is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Juicy Chemistry!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
